findings.title: Self-invalidating committed release authority
findings.description: A committed exact tuple was labelled current and would become stale on the next merge.
findings.recommendedAction: Use stable policy plus historical snapshot; resolve current runtime from external evidence.

findings.title: Physical PDF evidence absent
findings.description: Prior evidence contained HTML/route checks but no physical PDFs, page rasters, text or manifest.
findings.recommendedAction: Generate twelve A4/Letter PDFs plus rasters/text/manifest and fail CI on any assertion.

findings.title: Development upgrade and drift remain unproven
findings.description: Local clean replay and synthetic ledger-prefix rehearsal do not certify development or Production upgrade/apply.
findings.recommendedAction: Run target-derived upgrade/drift and hosted personas only after explicit approval.

findings.title: Protected Auth and membership personas remain unexecuted
findings.description: No real-user browser persona proves request-scoped project, RLS or Admin authority.
findings.recommendedAction: Run approved preview-only real identity and membership personas.

findings.title: Production privileged-environment evacuation not re-certified
findings.description: Repository checks cannot prove current hosted environment values or owner-controlled credential evacuation.
findings.recommendedAction: Obtain external exact-head negative evidence without changing Production in this task.

findings.title: Protected Storage remains unavailable
findings.description: Buckets exist in rehearsal evidence but object policies and authenticated protected-file personas are not active.
findings.recommendedAction: Keep protected Storage blocked until owner-approved policy and persona evidence.

findings.title: Real source activation and custody remain blocked
findings.description: Runtime source execution, custody, rights and atomic reservation are not authorized or proven.
findings.recommendedAction: Retain bundled/sample mode and fail-closed operator path.

findings.title: Post-merge CI evidence is external by definition
findings.description: A pull-request branch cannot know its future merge SHA or Production deployment.
findings.recommendedAction: Capture the exact tuple after merge outside repository CI.

findings.title: Product print CSS has no intrinsic page-number control
findings.description: Chromium evidence adds deterministic footer numbering; browser Print dialog behavior remains viewer-dependent.
findings.recommendedAction: Retain explicit limitation; consider approved intrinsic print footer later.

findings.title: Malformed browser-local JSON
findings.description: Corrupted local JSON must not crash Project Hub or leak stale data.
findings.recommendedAction: Keep fail-closed parsing and permanent browser test.

findings.title: Browser storage unavailable
findings.description: Privacy-restricted localStorage/sessionStorage must degrade to in-memory or unavailable states without a crash.
findings.recommendedAction: Keep contained storage access and permanent unavailable-storage personas.

findings.title: Unknown and stale state versions
findings.description: Unknown namespace versions are ignored, but there is no migration framework across future browser schemas.
findings.recommendedAction: Keep namespace isolation and add explicit migrations only with a versioned Product change.

findings.title: Cross-project state contamination
findings.description: Analyses, artifacts, uploads and AOIs must remain scoped to project identity.
findings.recommendedAction: Retain compound project identity checks and source contract.

findings.title: Oversized local artifact repository
findings.description: Oversized browser artifact indexes can cause quota or parse pressure.
findings.recommendedAction: Keep byte/entry/per-project caps and fail closed.

findings.title: Clipboard unavailable and repeated actions
findings.description: Clipboard denial and duplicate request action must remain local, idempotent and visible.
findings.recommendedAction: Keep manual-copy fallback and no-mutation double-action test.

findings.title: API inventory completeness
findings.description: The previous access manifest did not include cache, size, response, negative or diagnostics fields.
findings.recommendedAction: Regenerate and validate the 66-route inventory with every API change.

findings.title: Malformed and oversized request matrix incomplete
findings.description: Shared bounded readers cover selected routes; other request.json routes lack explicit byte caps.
findings.recommendedAction: Retain 400/413 matrix and close null size-limit entries incrementally.

findings.title: Public diagnostics sanitation
findings.description: Public status routes must not expose refs, credentials, table/bucket inventories or live probes.
findings.recommendedAction: Keep compact sanitized projection and contract tests.

findings.title: Request Access Lighthouse profile missing
findings.description: Request Access previously lacked a declared Lighthouse budget and final-URL assertion.
findings.recommendedAction: Keep profile, exact final URL and JS metrics in Quality Gate.

findings.title: Profile Lighthouse profile missing
findings.description: Profile previously lacked a declared Lighthouse budget and final-URL assertion. Its declared accessibility floor is 0.90 rather than the 0.95 default; improving the remaining audit findings needs a separate Product accessibility change.
findings.recommendedAction: Keep profile audit in demo_public built-app evidence and address remaining accessibility findings in an approved Product package.

findings.title: Route JS and chunk budgets were not recorded
findings.description: Prior summaries omitted transferred/decoded JS, largest chunks and route first-load proxy. The Auth Login profile is intentionally measured on the CI dev server and therefore has a separately declared development-bundle budget.
findings.recommendedAction: Track declared limits and top chunks on every Quality Gate; add a production Auth-mode build profile in a future evidence package.

findings.title: Mapbox initialization timing remains unisolated
findings.description: Lighthouse records Mapbox byte contribution but does not attribute map initialization latency independently.
findings.recommendedAction: Record as debt; do not refactor map runtime in this audit.

findings.title: Mutable GitHub Action tags
findings.description: Quality Gate uses mutable major tags for checkout, setup-node and upload-artifact.
findings.recommendedAction: Pin actions to reviewed immutable SHAs in a separate CI hardening change.

findings.title: Request correlation is incomplete
findings.description: Runtime logs do not provide a universal request correlation identifier across browser, API and backend layers.
findings.recommendedAction: Add privacy-safe request correlation in a dedicated runtime package.

findings.title: Local replay is not a hosted-clone certification
findings.description: Clean replay and synthetic prefix rehearsal do not prove target-specific drift, extensions or operator ownership.
findings.recommendedAction: Keep limitation explicit and require target-derived evidence before apply.

findings.title: Long-tail documentation lifecycle remains incomplete
findings.description: Historical Confluence and repository pages still require lifecycle reconciliation beyond active authority controls.
findings.recommendedAction: Continue lifecycle classification without rewriting historical receipts.

findings.title: Browser-local recovery messaging is generic
findings.description: Corrupted or oversized state is safely ignored but the user receives no specific recovery explanation.
findings.recommendedAction: Consider a bounded recovery notice in a later Product package.

findings.title: Browser-local state remains distributed
findings.description: State keys and schemas are spread across Workspace, Project Hub, report fallback, uploads and AOI modules.
findings.recommendedAction: Consolidate only in an approved architecture change; retain current guards meanwhile.

dataHonestyCaveat: Screening hypothesis; official validation required; not a legal, cadastral, zoning, planning or valuation conclusion.
